921046005.n: I got another plan for us

921046007.n: Got a bit too proud, huh?

921047014.n: Pushpa ko national Khiladi samjhe kya? International hai

921047030.n: Pushpa ke shudhu national vabchish naki? International

921048003.n: Rank up, break your fast, repeat!

921048004.n: Don't let there be a second time

921048005.n: Don't let there be a third time

921048006.n: The fourth time? That's just wrong.

921048008.n: You can revive me here, buddy

921048009.n: Saving up coins for a house or what!?

921048010.n: [Habib Ja'far] Heart can be empty, but my fasting won't be

921048011.n: [Habib Ja'far] You can play, but don't forget to pray

921048013.n: [Habib Ja'far] Don't be angry while playing!

921048014.n: [Habib Ja'far] Huh, you're also knocked down

921048015.n: [Habib Ja'far] Are you lost, young one?

921048016.n: [Habib Ja'far] Do you want to log in?

921048023.n: Do you want me to help rank up?

921048024.n: I don't know, don't know x3

921049004.n: What's up guys, are you afraid? Let rush in, let's go!

921049006.n: Go back to the lobby, pal!

921049007.n: Not even with a Lv. 4 Backpack could I carry you, huh?

921049035.n: Enemies down on the ground, eliminations up to the sky!

921049040.n: Another one back to the lobby!

921049049.n: Go talk to a mango tree!

921049050.n: Out of coins, can't revive my friend

921049052.n: Ugh, almost fell asleep, but I made it back

921050009.n: Yo c'mon, time to save the world!

921050011.n: Just a Bunny Warrior passing by, you know it!

921050012.n: Why is there so much silence?

921050014.n: Now what will you do Kaliya?

921050015.n: Basanti, don't dance in front of these guys

921050016.n: The one who gets scared, gets eliminated
